chatbot_intro: Hi, I'm Saathi — your mental health companion. How are you feeling today?

risk_labels.green: You're doing well. Keep it up!
risk_labels.orange: You seem to be going through a tough time. Help is available.
risk_labels.red: We're concerned about your wellbeing. Please reach out to a counselor now.

error_messages.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
error_messages.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
error_messages.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
error_messages.otp_expired: Your OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
error_messages.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please slow down.
error_messages.validation_error: Please check your inputs and try again.

mood_prompts.check_in: How are you feeling right now?
mood_prompts.sleep: How many hours did you sleep last night?
mood_prompts.energy: How would you rate your energy levels today?
mood_prompts.anxiety: On a scale of 1-10, how anxious are you feeling?

assessment.intro: Let's do a quick check-in. I'll ask you a few questions.
assessment.completed: Thank you for completing the assessment. Here are your results.
assessment.crisis_message: Your responses indicate you may be in crisis. Please call iCall: 9152987821 or Vandrevala Foundation: 1860-2662-345
